reason: GitHub Actions billing cap hit 2026-04-18 on donor-map-engine (private repo, ~4000 min/month vs 2000 min free tier cap). David's call to stop the bleed + rely on local CSV bulk enrichment (scripts/ingest-*-bulk.cjs) as the foundation. 7 workflows disabled via `gh workflow disable`. Kept active: RSS Intelligence (scheduled, viable) + Auto-Connection Engine (manual-trigger, no cost).
local_pipelines_paused_reason: David's 'all pipelines local-runs only' call (2026-04-28). Extends the API-pipeline pause to dispatcher producers that also hit external APIs. Currently the only such producer is financial-disclosures (Senate EFDS + House Clerk scraper). It has been commented out in scripts/attention-dispatcher.cjs. The capitol-trades-freshness harness check is also commented out so it doesn't flag noise while paused.
to_resume: Set paused: false here, then: gh workflow enable <id> --repo Guerillapropaganda/donor-map-engine for each workflow you want back. Raise GitHub spending limit first if still capped. To resume local pipelines, ALSO set local_pipelines_paused: false and uncomment the corresponding entries in scripts/attention-dispatcher.cjs and scripts/vault-audit.cjs CHECKS array.
